mapper.select: select count(*) from cm_customer where invitation_code = #{code}
select user_id, user_score from cm_customer where invitation_code = #{inviteCode}

select cc.user_id, cc.create_time, cc.phone, cc.name, cc.gender, cc.age, cc.merchant_id, cc.lock_flag, cc.verified, cmi.merchant_name as merchantName from cm_customer cc left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cc.merchant_id = cmi.id where cc.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update cm_customer set lock_flag = #{lockFlag} where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select user_id, im_access_token, create_time, phone, password, nickname, avatar, name, gender, age, email, birthday, hobby, major, brief, role_id, merchant_id, dept_id, user_number, lock_flag, user_score, if_gift_score, invitation_code, inviter_id, verified, update_time, del_flag from cm_customer where phone = #{phone}

select cm.user_id, cm.username, cm.create_time, cm.update_time, cm.lock_flag, cm.del_flag, cm.phone, cm.avatar, cm.dept_id, cd.name as deptName, cm.nickname, cm.name, cm.gender, cm.email, cm.birthday, cm.hobby, cm.major, cm.role_id, cm.merchant_id, cmi.merchant_name as merchantName from cm_customer cm left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cm.merchant_id = cmi.id left join sys_dept cd on cm.dept_id = cd.dept_id where cm.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update cm_customer set user_score = #{userScore} where user_id = #{userId}
